description: QuerySpec defines the query command line flags when starting Prometheus.

lookbackDelta.description: lookbackDelta defines the delta difference allowed for retrieving metrics during expression evaluations.

maxConcurrency.description: maxConcurrency defines the number of concurrent queries that can be run at once.

maxSamples.description: maxSamples defines the maximum number of samples a single query can load into memory. Note that queries will fail if they would load more samples than this into memory, so this also limits the number of samples a query can return.

timeout.description: timeout defines the maximum time a query may take before being aborted.
